report.summary: Cycle 7 standup: 5 agents ran since v6 (build-v3, design, community-v5, eod-v7, standup-v7). 2 new learn guides scaffolded (Bitcoin L2 + Intent-Based Trading), build fix commit 3b2dd28 landed (TS errors 147→141), 626 published slugs (+10 from courses/*), 5 Pectra-week tweets + 2 social cards drafted. 33 agent cycles today. Commit+push still needed to deploy.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA FROM V6: 5 new agent cycles completed — build-v3 (2 new learn guides: Bitcoin L2 $7.2B TVL + Intent-Based Trading 35-40% DEX volume), design (2 OG images + breadcrumb fixes), community-v5 (5 Pectra-week tweets #270-274 + 2 social cards), eod-v7 (build fix commit, TS errors down 6).

CONTENT PIPELINE: 10 learn guides now on disk, all production-ready. Latest 2: Bitcoin Layer 2 Guide 2026 (715 lines, Lightning/Stacks/BitVM, $7.2B TVL) + Intent-Based Trading Guide 2026 (756 lines, CoW Protocol/UniswapX/1inch Fusion, MEV protection).
PUBLISH STATUS: 626 published slugs in working tree (up from 616 — courses/* added in commit 3b2dd28). PUBLISH_QUEUE empty. 29 uncommitted files still awaiting push.
BUILD HEALTH: Commit 3b2dd28 landed — removed 'use client' from 4 learn pages fixing Vercel metadata export conflict. TS errors 147→141. Build expected to succeed on Vercel deploy.
MARKET DATA (last known, egress blocked): BTC ~$68,224-$68,688, ETH ~$2,104-$2,135, F&G 8 (Extreme Fear, 55-day streak). Pectra upgrade Apr 10 (9 days). Tax deadline Apr 15 (14 days).

SEO NOTE: No GSC or Vercel Analytics available from sandbox. 626 published slugs + 10 learn guides + all OG images ready. Pectra-week social campaign (5 tweets Apr 7-12) fully drafted. Deploy urgency compounding — Apr 10 search surge window closing.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE STATUS: 7th standup of Apr 1. Estimated 33 agent cycles today: standup ×7, build ×5, publish ×3, design ×6, community ×5, eod ×7.

V6 PRIORITIES STATUS: (1) Commit & Deploy — PARTIAL (build fix 3b2dd28 committed but 29 files still uncommitted, push needed). (2) Batch-scaffold 103 missing page.tsx — NOT STARTED (now 109 with courses/*). (3) Pre-Pectra content push — IN PROGRESS (smart wallets + restaking + Bitcoin L2 + intent trading guides all ready, awaiting deploy).

COMPLETED SINCE V6: Build-v3 created 2 new guides (Bitcoin L2 + Intent Trading, 1,471 lines). Design created 2 OG images + fixed breadcrumbs on new pages. Community-v5 drafted Pectra-week campaign (5 tweets #270-274 + 2 social cards). EOD-v7 confirmed build fix commit, 626 slugs, TS errors trending down.

P0 BLOCKER (PERSISTENT ALL DAY): 29 uncommitted files need commit+push. Includes published-pages.ts updates, 5+ learn page modifications, OG SVGs, community drafts, and 43 report JSONs across both workspaces. Single highest-leverage action remains unchanged.
P1 CARRY-OVER (WORSENING): 109 published slugs now missing page.tsx (up from 103 — courses/* added to published list without scaffolding). 18% indexing gap. Has been carry-over across all 7 standups.
P2: 2 slug-mismatched pages. 141 TS errors (stable, non-blocking). defi-yields fallback data gap. 8 learn pages with legacy <a href> breadcrumbs.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT & DEPLOY (UNCHANGED, URGENT): 626 published slugs, 10 learn guides, OG images, social cards, build fix — all sitting in working tree. Pectra upgrade Apr 10 is 9 days away. Smart Wallets guide MUST be indexed before then to capture search surge. Every hour of delay reduces organic capture window. This is a 2-minute action that unlocks $2,651 of agent work done today.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH-SCAFFOLD 109 MISSING PAGE.TSX: Now 18% indexing gap (up from 17%). courses/* added to published slugs without page files. Needs a DEDICATED build cycle — this keeps being deprioritized for new content. Recommend next build cycle targets ONLY scaffolding, no new content.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON PECTRA WINDOW (APR 7-12): Social campaign fully drafted (5 tweets + 2 social cards + Discord/TG announcement). Bitcoin L2 + Intent Trading guides add depth to the crypto education funnel. All content is deploy-ready. The Apr 7-15 window (Pectra + Tax deadline) is Q2's highest-leverage content period.

metrics.label: 💰 Actual Cost — Today's Sprint
metrics.value: $2,651 (33 cycles: standup×7=$315, build×5=$1,165, publish×3=$165, design×6=$360, community×5=$205, eod×7=$441)
